#BuildInPublic #StartupFounder

Lesson learned building Protelynx:

Don't build two products for two audiences at once.

We launched JiraFlow + ContentPilot simultaneously. Spread too thin. Both suffered.

Now we go deep on one ICP per quarter.

Focus is a growth strategy. Chaos isn't.

#BuildInPublic #SaaSFounder #Startups
